response.justification: The candidate lacks demonstrable C++ experience in industrial automation or high-performance systems, with most recent work focused on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang; while they have a brief C++ mention from 2014–2015, there is no evidence of modern C++/STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or IoT protocols required for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience across diverse systems
Proven track record in open-source contributions and technical mentoring
Deep understanding of event-driven architectures and DevOps practices
concerns: No recent or substantial C++ development experience in the last 9+ years
Lacks exposure to industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or OT protocols (MQTT, OPC UA, Modbus)
Primary tech stack is web-focused (TypeScript/Node.js), not aligned with on-premises/high-performance C++ requirements
